newRecording.description: Your current session has been saved.

errors.unableToDetermineSourcePath: Unable to determine source video path
errors.exportBackgroundLoadFailed: Export failed: could not load background image ({{url}})

recording.cameraBlocked: Camera access is blocked. Enable it in system settings to use the webcam.
recording.systemAudioUnavailable: System audio not available. Recording without system audio.
recording.microphoneDenied: Microphone access denied. Recording will continue without audio.
recording.cameraDenied: Camera access denied. Recording will continue without webcam.
recording.permissionDenied: Recording permission denied. Please allow screen recording.

autoCaptions.dialogDescription: Choose roughly how many words each caption shows at once. Timing is spread across the words in that phrase.
autoCaptions.loadingModel: Loading speech model (first use downloads ~75 MB)…
autoCaptions.busy: Caption generation is already in progress.
autoCaptions.noAudio: This video has no usable audio to transcribe.
autoCaptions.truncated: Only the first {{minutes}} minutes were transcribed.
